days.summary: ByteDance Seed surfaced the clearest concrete artifact set, highlighting its Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model and a new Full-Duplex Speech LLM aimed at more natural voice interaction with interference suppression. The rest of the signal is notably weaker: OpenMonoAgent.ai emerged as an open-source local coding agent, while SB Curated appeared as a named dataset for benchmarking Solidity vulnerability analysis tools, but neither came with the level of official validation or performance evidence needed for a higher-confidence strategic read.
